title: VRMC
description: Modpack Dedicated to a VR minecraft experience. This mod pack is in alpha hosting it for testing reasons
body:
VRMC Is a Modpack dedicated to a VR experience for minecraft with seamless integration!

This modpack consists low tech mods that will eventually evolve into high tech mods through the tech tree that will be integrated in, With that the better world terrain will give endless possibility's for building!

Overhauling the end and nether will provide the player a better experience in those dimensions allowing for a better and more interesting experience
